# Competing Technologies

TechGlobal Munich is a competitor of TechCorp Berlin.
TechGlobal Munich uses MongoDB instead of PostgreSQL.
Their CTO is Klaus Weber, who previously worked at SAP.

Alice Johnson (not Alice Schmidt) leads the frontend team at TechGlobal Munich.
She uses React and TypeScript, not Go or JWT.

Redis is also used by many companies unrelated to TechCorp Berlin.
Kubernetes is a container orchestration platform by Google.
Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in 1998.
